cross_scene_arcs.title: Anger and Mourning for Mother
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Alexandra progresses from hostile rejection of her mother to learning of her terminal condition, revealing infidelity, confronting her at the hospital, demanding accountability from her mother's lover, and participating in the ash-scattering ritual.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hostile and estranged, engaging in risky behavior.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Engaged in family mourning rituals, but with lingering resentment.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Coping with the combined impact of betrayal and impending loss.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Conflict and Reconciliation with Father
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Alexandra's relationship with Matt evolves from open rebellion and conflict over family boundaries to shared confrontation of her mother's lover and eventual reconnection in daily life after the funeral.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Strained and uncooperative, with frequent clashes.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Reconnected and settled in a post-loss family routine.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Providing Comfort and Guidance to Sister
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Alexandra assumes a supportive role for her sister Scottie, offering comfort during discussions of their mother's death, guiding her in the mourning ritual, and sharing quiet moments in the aftermath.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Integrated into family support, sharing daily routines.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Addressing Scottie's disturbing questions about death and cremation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Identifying and Confronting Mother's Lover
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Alexandra takes initiative to identify Brian Speer, expresses a desire to join Matt in confronting him, and directly questions him about the affair and his responsibility.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Curious and investigative, obtaining visual identification.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Engaged in emotional confrontation, demanding accountability.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the confrontation provides any personal closure.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Elizabeth's Terminal Decline and Final Rites
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Matt progresses from managing his wife's coma to receiving her terminal prognosis, saying goodbye, and scattering her ashes, transitioning to a widower.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Matt is managing work and hospital care for his comatose wife.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Matt has scattered Elizabeth's ashes with his daughters, completing the final tribute.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Uncovering and Confronting Elizabeth's Affair
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Matt discovers his wife's infidelity, confirms its continuity with friends, and confronts the lover, learning the affair was physical and expressing grief.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Matt is unaware of his wife's affair.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Matt has confronted the affair's reality and is emotionally affected.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Matt's grief and how to move forward.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Fatherly Responsibilities and Scottie's Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Matt is confronted with Scottie's behavioral issues at school and later strengthens his bond with his daughters during the ash-scattering ceremony.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Matt is disengaged from Scottie's emotional needs.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Matt actively leads his daughters in a final ritual for their mother.

cross_scene_arcs.title: School Disruption and Cyberbullying Fallout
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Scottie's disruptive behavior at school escalates to cyberbullying a classmate, resulting in a forced apology that leaves her behavioral issues unresolved.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Acts out with profane singing at school, showing disengagement and prompting staff intervention.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Apologizes to Lani under Matt's pressure, but Barb doubts the sincerity, and the apology may not prevent future conflicts.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Scottie will stop her mean behavior towards peers and avoid further disciplinary action.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Grief Journey from Avoidance to Acceptance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Scottie progresses from resisting communication with her comatose mother and fearing death to accepting her mother's terminal condition, participating in grief rituals, and finding comfort in family.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Avoids talking to her mother in the hospital, expressing hunger and thirst instead of emotion.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Scatters her mother's ashes with a goodbye and shares a quiet family moment on the sofa, indicating acceptance and bonding.
